  private static java.lang.Thread lambda$new$0(java.lang.Runnable);
    Code:
         0: new           #245                // class java/lang/Thread
         3: dup
         4: aload_0
         5: ldc_w         #799                // String NetworkIO
         8: invokespecial #801                // Method java/lang/Thread."<init>":(Ljava/lang/Runnable;Ljava/lang/String;)V
        11: astore_1
        12: aload_1
        13: iconst_1
        14: invokevirtual #804                // Method java/lang/Thread.setDaemon:(Z)V
        17: aload_1
        18: areturn

  static {};
    Code:
         0: new           #628                // class com/google/gson/Gson
         3: dup
         4: invokespecial #808                // Method com/google/gson/Gson."<init>":()V
         7: putstatic     #623                // Field GSON:Lcom/google/gson/Gson;

}
